title: Junior Software Developer
mainText: Developed robust AI/ML models for time series data.
desc: Developed models to detect 'markers' (individual important entries) on 400-3000 entry long time series data with 90% accuracy.
Developed models to accurately align noisy time-series sensor readings temporally for further analysis.
Developed models to detect and warn when marker placing model failed.
Architected an end-to-end machine learning service.
Wrote AWS lambda functions to run and manage models, and terraform to deploy them.
Helped develop robust model versioning using S3.
Wrote a genetic algorithm that improved prototype model accuracy by more then 20%.
Wrote algorithm to detect and fix inaccurate RPM readings from Container Twin sensor.
Wrote robust C code to replace java code in performance critical sections.

title: CS Square Student Assistant
mainText: Helping organize and promote the CS square at UNB.

title: Seafood Clerk
desc: Worked in a team and individually to ensure the department was running properly.
Monitored product closely and communicated possible issues to supervisor.
